text:
Created attachment 245322
dirty patch

This is a quick and dirty patch to switch to xavery@ fork, which is most starred (https://github.com/xavery/transgui).
Unfortunately, it doesn't fix access violation on startup. Moreover, clicking anywhere in menu which should open new forms (like "About") causes invalid type cast error and application termination.

Attaching it here for reference.
